en.extract:
The Sumatran drongo (Dicrurus sumatranus) is a passerine bird in the family Dicruridae. It was formerly considered conspecific with the hair-crested drongo. It is endemic to the island of Sumatra in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Sumatran drongo''' ('''''Dicrurus sumatranus''''') is a [[passerine]] bird in the family [[Dicruridae]]. It was formerly considered [[conspecific]] with the [[hair-crested drongo]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the island of [[Sumatra]] in [[Indonesia]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
